name: Impossible Brunch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: 8 ounces of frozen asparagus spears, cooked and drained can be substituted for the broccoli.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. Grease a pie plate measuring 9 x 13 inches (double layer) with butter.
4. Spread the chopped broccoli evenly in the greased pie plate.
5. In a large bowl, beat together sour cream, cottage cheese, Bisquick baking mix, melted margarine, and eggs until smooth. Blend for 15 seconds using a blender on high speed or whisk for 1 minute with a hand beater.
6. Pour the mixture over the broccoli in the pie plate.
7. Top with peeled and thinly sliced tomatoes.
8. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese evenly over the top.
9. Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, approximately 30 minutes.
10. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving. Yields 6-8 servings.
High Altitude (3,500 to 6,500 feet): Use a larger pie plate measuring 10 x 1 ½ inches. Bake for about 35 minutes.
